title: Wood Carving Tools, 10 in 1 Wood Whittling Kits, Chip Carving Tools Set, with 0 Basswood Carving Block, 6PCS Whittling Tools, Gloves, Sharpener, Roll Canvas Bag, Wood Carving Set for Adult Beginners
features: ⭐【10PCS Complete Wood Carving Kit】Professional wood whittling kit for beginners includes 3 whittling tools, 3 detail wood carving tools, 1 pair of cut-resistant gloves, leather strop, polishing compound and a portable tool roll bag for storing instruments.

👍【Ergonomic Wood Whittling tools】Our wood carving tool blades are made of high-quality steel, which is high hardness and corrosion-resistant, making them easy to use. Comes with a built-in iron buckle to secure the blade in place, prevent the blade and handle from breaking. Paired with an ergonomic round handle design, made of walnut and feels comfortable in your hand, allowing you to work for hours without fatigue.

💪【High Quality Natural Basswood Blocks】Each wood carving kit includes 8 pcs all-natural and harmless basswood blocks, which are lightweight and easy to carve and stain. Whittling kits can be used to create a variety of unique arts and crafts such as spoons, rabbits, cats, dogs, bears and other wooden crafts.

💪【Multifunctional Wood Carving Tools】This wood carving set can meet your various wood carving creation needs, from beginners to professional sharpeners, everyone can enjoy wood carving. Detailing tools and carving tools are suitable for working with concave or rounded wood. 3 PCS detailing wood carving tools can be used to add fine lines and decorative patterns.

💯【Perfect and Lightweight Set Match】Each wood whittling kit comes with a portable roll-up storage bag for easy storage and portability. Cut-resistant gloves protect your hands from cuts and scrapes. Polishing compound and leather strop protect the blade from rusting, making it smoother and sharper.
